verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_3: And [by] the even [number] and the odd
verse.verse_4: And [by] the night when it passes,
verse.verse_5: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception?
verse.verse_6: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad -
verse.verse_8: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?
verse.verse_9: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley?
verse.verse_10: And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes? -
verse.verse_11: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands
verse.verse_13: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.
verse.verse_14: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.
verse.verse_15: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."
verse.verse_16: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."
verse.verse_17: No! But you do not honor the orphan
verse.verse_18: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.
verse.verse_19: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,
verse.verse_20: And you love wealth with immense love.
verse.verse_21: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed -
verse.verse_22: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,
verse.verse_23: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?
verse.verse_24: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."
verse.verse_25: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment,
verse.verse_26: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].
verse.verse_27: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,
verse.verse_28: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],
